topic: Private Land Wildlife Management: What Landowners Can Do

items.title: Private Lands are the Key to Success in Conservation
items.description: The survival of threatened, endangered, and at-risk species largely depends on the stewardship of these private lands.

items.title: Private Lands Conservation - The Nature Conservancy
items.description: Private lands conservation is an innovative tactic that leverages the increasing interest of the private sector to take part in conservation.

items.title: Private Lands Management - NC Wildlife
items.description: 80 percent of North Carolina's land is privately owned. Private landowners set the goals for their property and decide how their property will be managed.

items.title: Wildlife Management for Property Owners 101
items.description: Wildlife management on recreational property and ranches is an elemental part of a healthy habitat and long-term conservation.

items.title: Private Lands Management (PLM) - California Department of Fish and Wildlife
items.description: This government-private collaborative program that offers landowners incentives to manage their lands for the benefit of wildlife.

items.title: Private Lands - K-State Extension Wildlife Management
items.description: Our state boasts a surprising mixture of wildlife. That diversity depends upon our vigilance.

items.title: How States Shape Wildlife Conservation on Private Lands
items.description: This study analyzes policies from all 50 states across six major categories related to wildlife conservation, management, and hunting on private land.

items.title: Wildlife Management on Private Lands in Florida
items.description: We collected data on private lands wildlife management, participation in private lands management programs, and landowner demographics.

items.title: Private Lands Management - California Land Conservation Assistance Network
items.description: This partnership between wildlife managers and private landowners helps conserve and maintain wildlife habitat in our state.

items.title: Private Lands Management (PLM) - CDFW
items.description: This government-private collaborative program that offers landowners incentives to manage their lands for the benefit of wildlife.

items.title: Working with Private Landowners - Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
items.description: The Landowner Assistance Program can provide technical assistance and conservation plan preparation at no cost for private landowners.

items.title: The Balancing act: public wildlife on Private lands - Western Landowners Alliance
items.description: Policies regarding private lands-public wildlife management influence a landowner's ability to manage habitat.

items.title: Mississippi Private Lands Habitat Program - Land Conservation Assistance Network
items.description: The Private Lands Program can help you meet your wildlife management goals and potentially save time and money.

items.title: Wildlife Management on Private Lands in Florida - SEAFWA
items.description: Private landowners and conservation are essential to wildlife management.

items.title: Private Lands and Habitat Program - TPWD - Texas.gov
items.description: The goal of the Private Lands and Habitat Program is to provide advice and information to private landowners interested in conservation.

items.title: Programs for landowners to fine-tune their properties - NC Wildlife Federation
items.description: There are resources for landowners to seek for habitat conservation and wildlife management on their lands.

items.title: Land and Wildlife Management Services in North Carolina - Triangle Pond Management
items.description: Learn how our wildlife management services can help you maximize your investment, create hunting opportunities.

items.title: Private Lands Stewardship Program - Georgia Wildlife Federation
items.description: Georgia Wildlife Federation's wildlife biologist is available for AT-NO-COST forestry and wildlife habitat management assistance to Georgia landowners.

items.title: Wildlife Habitat Management - A Landowner's Guide - Vermont Fish & Wildlife
items.description: This manual was developed by department staff to provide useful information and guidance to landowners, foresters, wildlife biologists.

items.title: Partners for Fish and Wildlife - U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service
items.description: All private landowners interested in restoring wildlife habitat on their land are eligible to participate.

items.title: Wildlife Habitat | Natural Resources Conservation Service
items.description: NRCS offers technical and financial assistance to help producers and landowners manage for wildlife habitat.

items.title: Creating a Wildlife Habitat Management Plan for Landowners - Purdue University
items.description: This 12 page publication is packed with photos, resources and suggestions to help meet your wildlife management goals.

items.title: Plateau Wildlife Services - Plateau Land & Wildlife Management
items.description: Discover Wildlife management services including service agreements, compliance, consulting, reporting.

items.title: How to Get Wildlife Management Assistance for Your Land - Mossy Oak Gamekeeper
items.description: State and federal programs offer significant support for private landowners seeking to improve wildlife habitats.

items.title: Wildlife Habitat Management on Private Lands - Virginia DWR
items.description: It serves as a primer to landowners interested in making a difference for birds and other wildlife on their properties.

items.title: Wildlife and Forest Management Resources for Private Landowners - UW-Madison
items.description: A 14 publication series designed to offer suggestions to private landowners on how to manage their land for wildlife.

items.title: Working with Private Landowners - Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
items.description: The Landowner Assistance Program can provide technical assistance and conservation plan preparation at no cost.

items.title: Wildlife Habitat Management for Arkansas Landowners - Arkansas LCAN
items.description: This handbook introduces ideas for improving your land for wildlife and provides sources for additional information.

items.title: What is a Conservation Easement? - National Conservation Easement Database
items.description: A conservation easement is a voluntary, legal agreement that permanently limits uses of the land in order to protect its conservation values.

items.title: What is a Conservation Easement? - Texas Land Trust Council
items.description: Conservation easements enable landowners to protect valuable natural or cultural resources for future generations, while maintaining private ownership.

items.title: Conservation Easements FAQs - Florida DEP
items.description: Under a conservation easement, a private landowner can manage their property for timber production, sod, row crops, cattle grazing, hunting.

items.title: Conservation easement - Wikipedia
items.description: The landowner who grants a conservation easement continues to manage and otherwise privately own the land.

items.title: eTools: Conservation Easements - Chester County Planning Commission
items.description: A conservation easement is a tool for permanently protecting land while allowing private landowners to maintain ownership and control.

items.title: Conservation Easements | Virginia Department of Forestry
items.description: A conservation easement is a voluntary agreement between a landowner and a public agency or private land trust.

items.title: Conservation Easements Explained | TLC Education NC
items.description: A voluntary but legally binding agreement which allows the owner to remain in control of their property and use the land, sell it, or pass it on to heirs.

items.title: Conservation easements: A tool for preserving wildlife habitat - The Wildlife Society
items.description: Conservation easements are an essential tool for conserving private lands, and they have great potential for enhancing wildlife habitat.

items.title: Living with your Conservation Easement - NC DEQ
items.description: Those with interest in visiting a conservation easement on private property should first obtain written permission from the landowner.

items.title: How to conserve your land - Land Trust Alliance
items.description: Conservation easement: Where landowners and a land trust enter a legal agreement to permanently limit the use of an area.
